stages.objective: Observe sleep-induced blocking and timed wakeup.
stages.goal: Confirm sys.sleep and proc.wakeup appear in correct progression.
stages.theory_detail: Sleep sets blocked-until tick; process cannot run again before wake condition is met.

hints.nudge: Check blocked and wake trace events.
hints.concept: Sleep delays execution without consuming process run time.
hints.explicit: Run until wakeup event appears after sleep request.

stages.goal: Pass wakeup and completion validators together.

hints.concept: Wakeup is an intermediate state, not final success.
hints.explicit: Continue steps after wakeup until process exits and metrics update.

stages.objective: Apply timing tuning and keep liveness guarantees.
stages.goal: Use config limits and keep wakeup/completion checks green.

hints.concept: Liveness should hold across timing variations in deterministic simulation.
hints.explicit: Apply one latency change, rerun, and verify wakeup + completion again.
